zh.Lallaing, Flanders, France: 法國福藍德 福藍薩
zh.Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Cal: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德福林-利斯-拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing於大約1252年出生在法國福藍德 福藍薩時，他的父親Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing29歲，母親Agnes de Willerval19歲。他和Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain至少有3個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1333年5月3日享年82歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德福林-利斯-拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing于大约1252年出生在法国福藍德 福藍薩时，他的父亲Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing29岁，母亲Agnes de Willerval19岁。他和Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain至少有3个儿子和7个女儿。他去世于1333年5月3日享年82岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德福林-利斯-拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing was born about 1252, in French Flanders, France, his father, Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, was 29 and his mother, Agnes de Willerval, was 19. He had at least 3 sons and 7 daughters with Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain. He died on 3 May 1333, at the age of 82, and was buried in Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing est né environ 1252, à Flandre française, France, son père, Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Willerval, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles avec Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain. Il est décédé le 3 mai 1333, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing um 1252 in Flandre française, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing 29 und seine Mutter Agnes de Willerval 19. Er hatte mit Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Mai 1333 im Alter von 82 Jahren und wurde in Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing è nato il circa 1252 nel Flandre française, Francia, il suo padre, Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Willerval, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie con Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain. Morì il 3 maggio 1333, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Cal: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードフライネス-ルeス-ラチェス
ja.lifeSummary: Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaingが約1252年にフランスフランダー フランcアイゼで生まれた時，父Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaingは29歳，母Agnes de Willervalは19歳であった。彼はMahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrainとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は1333年5月3日に82歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードフライネス-ルeス-ラチェスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing(이)가 대략 1252년 프랑스 플랜드르 프랜c아이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Willerval(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 5월 3일 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 플라이네스-e스-라체스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing nasceu aproximadamente 1252, em Flandre française, França, seu pai, Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Willerval, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas com Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain. Ele faleceu em 3 de maio de 1333, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing родился около 1252 г. в местности фландр франcеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Willerval, 19. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей от Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain. Он умер 3 мая 1333 г. в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности флаинес-лeс-рэичесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing nació aproximadamente 1252, en Flandre française, Francia, su papá, Nicolas II de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes de Willerval, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas con Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1333, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
